name: Melba Cheesecake Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave butter in a pie plate, covered, for 30-60 seconds on HIGH until melted.
2. Mix in crumbs and 2 tablespoons sugar; press onto bottom and sides of the pie plate.
3. Microwave uncovered on HIGH for 1.5 to 2 minutes or until hot.
4. Arrange peaches in crust.
5. Microwave cream cheese in a glass bowl on MEDIUM for 1 minute, or until soft. Blend remaining ingredients (except jam) together.
6. Pour the blended mixture over the peaches.
7. Microwave uncovered at HIGH for 3.5 to 4.5 minutes or until edges are set, rotating once.
8. Cool. Spoon jam onto the pie.
